DP.051.0000:
The books on the third floor are
easy to read.\f
The ones down here are all too tough
for me to understand...
DP.051.0001:
I looked up a book called
“Surviving Disasters” right away!
DP.051.0002:
The ceiling-high bookshelves are
crammed with books.
DP.051.0003:
The shelves are lined with books
worn from being read by many.
DP.051.0004:
Please refrain from bringing food
or beverages into the library.
